subject: cinematography
original: Demonstrates clear and confident control over exposure and colour, maintaining consistency across shots.
refined: Cinematography: Demonstrates clear and confident control over exposure and colour, keeping shots consistent. To reach the next level, push subtle tonal choices to express mood.

subject: cinematography
original: Applies lenses and depth of field purposefully to enhance visual storytelling.
refined: Cinematography: Applies lenses and depth of field purposefully to enhance visual storytelling. A strong foundation to build on as you explore more expressive focal choices.

subject: cinematography
original: Uses composition and camera angles thoughtfully to create engaging and well-structured frames.
refined: Cinematography: Uses composition and camera angles thoughtfully to create engaging, well-structured frames. Keep motivating each frame with intent to deepen impact.

subject: cinematography
original: Maintains strong continuity, ensuring smooth visual flow across shots.
refined: Cinematography: Maintains strong continuity, ensuring smooth visual flow across shots. A reliable strength to carry into more complex sequences.

subject: cinematography
original: Utilizes close-ups and framing effectively to communicate intent and guide viewer attention.
refined: Cinematography: Uses close-ups and framing effectively to communicate intent and guide viewer attention. Continue refining timing to sharpen emotional impact.

subject: cinematography
original: Maintains consistent technical control over exposure and white balance throughout.

subject: cinematography
original: Demonstrates a strong understanding of visual storytelling through deliberate and effective choices.

subject: cinematography
original: Overall work reflects clarity of intent, technical control and strong visual awareness.
refined: Cinematography: Overall work reflects clarity of intent, technical control and strong visual awareness. A confident foundation to keep extending through ambitious projects.

subject: cinematography
original: Demonstrates a good understanding of exposure and colour, with scope to improve consistency across shots.
refined: Cinematography: Demonstrates a good understanding of exposure and colour. Advice to build consistency by metering deliberately and checking each setup against the last — even exposure across a scene comes through repeated practice and feedback.

subject: cinematography
original: Applies lenses and depth of field with awareness and can refine control to strengthen visual impact.
refined: Cinematography: Applies lenses and depth of field with awareness. Advice to develop stronger control by testing different apertures and focal lengths before the shoot, so depth choices reliably strengthen each image.

subject: cinematography

refined: Cinematography: Uses composition and camera angles effectively in parts. Advice to make framing more consistent by setting clear compositional rules per scene — balance and headroom that hold across shots grow with repeated practice.

subject: cinematography
original: Maintains basic continuity and can improve visual flow by refining shot transitions.
refined: Cinematography: Maintains basic continuity. Advice to improve visual flow by planning entry and exit framing so transitions match cleanly, a smoothness that develops through repeated practice and feedback.

subject: cinematography
original: Uses close-ups and framing with intent and can strengthen their impact through more purposeful application.
refined: Cinematography: Uses close-ups and framing with intent. Advice to strengthen their impact by tying each close-up to a specific story beat, so the framing earns its place in the cut.

subject: cinematography
original: Maintains generally sound technical control, with further refinement in exposure and white balance improving consistency.
refined: Cinematography: Maintains generally sound technical control. Advice to refine exposure and white balance by setting a reference at the start of each setup and matching to it, building consistency through repeated practice.

subject: cinematography
original: Shows a clear understanding of visual storytelling, with more deliberate choices can strengthen narrative clarity.
refined: Cinematography: Shows a clear understanding of visual storytelling. Advice to strengthen narrative clarity by making each shot choice serve one clear intent, a discipline that sharpens through repeated practice and feedback.

subject: cinematography

refined: Cinematography: Overall work is competent and well-structured. Advice to refine both technical control and visual decisions through repeated practice and feedback to reach a higher degree of polish.

subject: cinematography

refined: Cinematography: Shows a basic understanding of exposure and colour. Advice to develop more consistent control by metering every setup and using a monitor or histogram to check, so even exposure becomes second nature with repeated practice.

refined: Cinematography: Applies lenses and depth of field at a basic level. Advice to practice with one lens at a time, observing how aperture and distance change the image, so focal choices become purposeful through repeated practice and feedback.

subject: cinematography

refined: Cinematography: Demonstrates clear understanding of motivated camera movement, with each move supporting narrative intent. A strong base for tackling more ambitious blocking.

refined: Cinematography: Controls rhythm, pace and tempo effectively, enhancing the visual flow of the scene. Keep experimenting to make pacing even more expressive.

refined: Cinematography: Constructs well-planned camera movements that contribute meaningfully to storytelling. A confident skill to extend into more complex setups.

refined: Cinematography: Integrates emotion with camera movement, strengthening the impact of each scene. Continue refining this connection for even greater resonance.

refined: Cinematography: Executes basic camera movements such as pan and tilt with precision and smooth control. A reliable foundation for moving on to dynamic rigs.

refined: Cinematography: Applies foundational lighting techniques effectively, including three-point lighting and bounce control. A solid base for shaping more expressive looks.
